title: Quantifying AI Performance
description: A flowchart illustrating the key metrics and processes involved in quantifying the performance, uncertainty, and value of an AI model.
elements: Performance Metrics (e.g., Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-Score)
Uncertainty Quantification (e.g., Confidence Scores, Prediction Intervals)
Business/Real-World Impact Metrics (e.g., ROI, Efficiency Gains)
relationships: Input Data is processed by the AI Model to produce an output
The output is measured using Performance Metrics to assess technical quality
Uncertainty Quantification evaluates the model's confidence in its predictions
Finally, the model's value is quantified using Business Impact Metrics to determine its real-world effectiveness
